title: cassia rigida
intro: Cassia rigida, also known as Senna, is a plant species native to Africa and Asia that belongs to the legume family. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cassia rigida include relieving constipation, reducing fever, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Cassia rigida is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome.
